name: ty
message:
Hi Madi (Madison or otherwise known as Maddie in my eyes),

I just want to start off by saying happy birthday. I hope you're having a wonderful time with friends over in the Valley (🤠), as well as family.

I think when I first interacted with you was some time at Friendsgiving last November. I think I'm a very much intimidated by people in general, but I think I was most intimidated by you because, in my mind, you were really cool and I wanted to be your friend. I'm grateful that I've had the chance to be closer to you this year, and I'm very sad that it was your last year, even though you graduated and you are no longer in San Diego (at least for the foreseeable future I hope).

I want to stay in touch. That's for sure we'll definitely do some cool things over the summer. I think I'm extremely grateful to have gotten to know you and be your friend. I think you're very funny and you bring energy to any group you're in. You know how to lift up a group that might seem the least social out there, and I think that's a very good quality to have.

As I've gotten to know you better, I think one of the qualities that you have is your ability to be considerate, and often times you think of it as a fault. You say yes to things even though it might not always work out and might conflict with your schedule and whatnot. I remember you were talking about this in the car, and I think that's a quality that you often view as something negative, but I think that's a quality that I very much admire in you. I too share that at times I overcommit, and it ends up biting me in the ass eventually.

I would just like to say that oftentimes we're our biggest critic, and I think this is definitely something that applies to you. I think there are not a lot of considerate people out there in the world, and as I've gotten to know you throughout this year, you are one of those few. Keep on being you 😛

name: alex
message: Hey Madi Happy Birthday and congrats on graduating!! 🥳🎉 I wish I couldve hung out more but Im so glad to be able to have met you and have you as my mentee for a short time! I already know post grad is gonna great for you, I wish you the best of luck🙂‍↕️

name: julie
message: HAPPY BIRTHDAY MADI!!! Hope you have fun today and eats lots of good food :)

name: alice
message: MADIIII i love you so much you're so amazing and baddie and the best ever I'm so happy we met and I'm excited for all the good things coming ahead for you 💗💗💗💗

name: christine
message: happy 22nd birthday madi 🎉🎉i think ur rlly funny and sweet and im rlly glad that we got to meet! i hope you have an amazing birthday with all ur friends and family and i hope you get hella lit too 😛😛

name: chloe
message: happy birthday madi baddie!! i’m so grateful to have someone as whimsical, funny, caring, and a mega ray of sunshine like you as a friend. wishing u a lovely, successful 22 & post grad life, I’ll miss you so much 🫰🏼

name: edlyn
message:
hi madi,

HAPPY BIRTHDAY!!! i hope 22 treats u well :) may u have another year filled with happiness, fun, and wealth (get that bag)

hope to see u soon,
edlyn ❤️

name: sally
message: My loveliest girl, I'm so happy you exist in this universe. Thank you for indulging in our endlessly flexible conversations. Between all of our serious talks and silly brain rot references, I often thank God I get to spend my precious time in senior year with you. Here's to hoping our friendship flourishes beyond college <3 You inspire me to be a better friend, designer, and person always. I hope you know how talented and amazing you are. The way you carry yourself is magnetic. Thanks for being who you are and allowing me to be who I am. Together, we are an dream team ekekekeke >:) No matter how hectic life gets, just know I'll always be in your corner cheering for you. I'm forever one call/text away. You've taught me so much about myself & left your mark on how much more beautiful I can view this whimsical life. From the bottom of my heart, thanks for everything :3c Happy birthday, Madi! With all my love, Sally

name: vicky
message: HII MADI HAPPY 22ND I HOPE U HAVE A WONDERFUL BIRTHDAY. my prettiful chingu and the joy of the room. i wish we were there to celebrate with u!! eat lots of cake!!!! ILYSMMM MY SNOOP 💓

name: manu
message: HAIII MADI!! Happy birthday! I am so sad we can’t do anything in person this week... But I hope you enjoy our little gift! I miss you so much already :C I hope you had a wonderful birthday with yummy food. I can’t wait for LOST IN DREAMS (the Real brithday celebration) and our future adventures!! I am so grateful  to know someone as funny and caring as you! Take care always and have an amazing 22!

name: khang
message: hello again unc happy birthday, pushing 30 i see. i hope you have an amazing day and hope u enjoyed this little website we built together. thanks for leaving me behind 🙄 that being said you need to visit sd again very soon. also don’t forget about me when ur a trillionaire. see ya at lost in dreams and yosemite can’t wait 😛

name: jaden
message: hi madi happy birthday i hope u enjoy our gift khang and manu did most of the work but i hope u have the best birthday ever ill bring u some stuff from new york and virginia and some c1 merch u r a super cool person some of the best memories in my life were made with yall i hope u have the best 32nd bday of ur life bro ur so old what r u gonna do but yes i hope everything goes well we miss u sm back in sd and we will drive up to hang out w u lots byeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
